body:
Add support for prompts like "Забей мне 18 число в 17:00 по грузии на встречу с Леваном":

- New meanings/roles in data/seed/meanings-calendar.lino for schedule actions ("забей", "поставь", "schedule"...), events ("встреча"), clock times, and timezone aliases ("по грузии" etc. → Asia/Tbilisi).
- try_calendar_create_event handler: parses day-of-month ("NN число"), HH:MM times, extracts title after "на", resolves TZ, applies next-month rollover for past days, defaults 60min duration.
- Early guard in calendar reasoning + promotion via append_prompt_relevants + dispatch so these imperatives no longer hit unknown.
- Rich trace events (calendar:parsed_date/time/time_zone/title/...).
- Confirmation-style response (MVP does not auto-create external events; surfaces can act on the intent + evidence).
- Full Rust <-> WASM (formal_ai_worker.js) parity using the same lexicon-driven approach.
- Unit tests for the exact bug repro + English fallback in reasoning_paths.rs.
- Updated e2e multilingual test + coverage script (check-multilingual-intent-coverage.mjs).
- Source mirrors kept in sync; new changelog fragment.

Closes #404
title: feat: natural language calendar event creation (#404)
